profile.name: Michael
profile.role_in_household: Primary; tends to lead retirement-timing and big-picture planning, and wants decisions to map cleanly to their target retirement age.
profile.financial_literacy_level: Moderate-to-high: comfortable with retirement accounts, asset allocation, and tax concepts; likes seeing assumptions and tradeoffs, but doesn’t always have every account figure memorized without checking statements.
profile.risk_attitude_behavioral: Moderate in behavior: accepts market swings if tied to a clear plan, but gets cautious when outcomes feel uncertain near retirement; skeptical of anything that feels overly complex or illiquid unless explained plainly.
profile.communication_style: Calm and structured; uses qualifiers like "I think" and "roughly," pauses to recall details, and asks for a recap. Will gently correct numbers if they affect the plan.
emotional_tendencies: relief when there is a checklist and timeline
profile.decision_making_style: Evidence-based and sequential: prefers options with pros/cons, then a short pause before committing to major changes.
profile.trust_level_toward_advisor: Cautiously trusting: open to guidance but expects transparency on fees, taxes, and what is known vs. unknown.
internal_biases: status quo bias toward incremental changes
hidden_concerns: fear of a large drawdown in the years right before retirement
concern about making an avoidable tax mistake in a high bracket

profile.name: Jennifer
profile.role_in_household: Spouse/partner; more engaged on day-to-day cash flow and the taxable/cash accounts, and pushes for practical clarity on what changes mean month-to-month.
profile.financial_literacy_level: Moderate: understands budgeting and investing basics, but prefers plain English and sometimes mixes terms (balance vs. payment, gross vs. net) when speaking quickly.
profile.risk_attitude_behavioral: Moderate but more reactive: generally okay with risk, yet becomes more conservative after bad market news; strongly values liquidity and a visible cash buffer.
profile.communication_style: Conversational and fast; speaks in round numbers and ranges ("about," "somewhere around"), asks frequent clarifying questions, and may interrupt to bring it back to real-life impact.
emotional_tendencies: confidence when there are clear guardrails and next steps
profile.decision_making_style: Collaborative and values-based: wants a short list of recommendations and flexibility, then aligns with Michael before final decisions.
profile.trust_level_toward_advisor: Warm but verifying: builds rapport quickly, but checks that recommendations aren’t sales-driven and match their priorities.
hidden_concerns: worry about maintaining lifestyle while transitioning into retirement
concern about health-related surprises even though things feel fine now
